loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC Panel 2 aggregate data; some feeders (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N12, GIC-15-N13, GIC-03-N2, GIC-05-N11, GIC-05-N12) are dark (no data) and will render as blanks.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time power distribution for active feeders (AHU-8, Curing Line, Utility Panel, Canteen, STP, AHU-5, MRPDB, AHU-6, AHU-7, MLDB, BPDB-03, BPDB-04, Elec Room N, Air Washer-4, FCBC, Air Washer Exhaust-04/05/06). Incomer, UPS, BPDB, and HHF sections are blank as their member meters report no data (has_data=N).

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power (active_power_total_kw) — per-member breakdowns are rendered by the panel-aggregate from member meters; contracted capacity is unknown, so the demand-vs-capacity ratio cannot be computed.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend; some feeders (GIC-03-N2, GIC-05-N11, GIC-05-N12) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-member panel rollups (voltage, current unbalance, average current) — supply-side feeders have no data.
